purpose: Primary drive component providing rotational power and speed control for machining operations with thermal dynamics and velocity control

inputs.name: motor_voltage_command
inputs.description: Voltage command signal to control motor speed and torque

outputs.name: actual_spindle_speed
outputs.description: Measured rotational speed of the spindle motor

outputs.name: zero_speed_detection
outputs.description: Boolean flag indicating if spindle speed is at or near zero

outputs.name: motor_current
outputs.description: Electrical current drawn by the motor

outputs.name: drive_torque
outputs.description: Mechanical torque output from the motor

states.name: motor_temperature
states.description: Motor temperature accumulation from heat generation and cooling

states.name: velocity_error_accumulation
states.description: Accumulated velocity control error affecting speed accuracy

states.name: position_accuracy_degradation
states.description: Position accuracy degradation from encoder wear and signal degradation

events.name: motor_overheat
events.description: Motor overheat alarm when temperature exceeds safe operating limits

events.name: excessive_velocity_error
events.description: Excessive velocity error alarm when speed control accuracy degrades

events.name: overspeed
events.description: Overspeed alarm when motor exceeds maximum safe speed

events.name: short_time_overload
events.description: Short-time overload alarm from temporary high current conditions

events.name: motor_lock
events.description: Motor lock alarm when rotor cannot rotate despite voltage command

events.name: current_overload
events.description: Current overload alarm when electrical current exceeds motor ratings

parameters.name: heat_generation_rate
parameters.description: Rate of heat generation per unit voltage command

parameters.name: cooling_rate
parameters.description: Natural cooling rate of motor to ambient temperature

parameters.name: velocity_error_rate
parameters.description: Rate of velocity error accumulation under load

parameters.name: velocity_error_decay
parameters.description: Natural decay rate of velocity error when unloaded

parameters.name: position_accuracy_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for position accuracy degradation

parameters.name: speed_gain
parameters.description: Motor speed response to voltage command

parameters.name: current_gain
parameters.description: Motor current response to voltage command

parameters.name: torque_gain
parameters.description: Motor torque response to voltage command

parameters.name: zero_speed_threshold
parameters.description: Speed threshold below which zero speed is detected

parameters.name: overheat_threshold
parameters.description: Temperature threshold for motor overheat alarm

parameters.name: velocity_error_threshold
parameters.description: Velocity error threshold for excessive error alarm

parameters.name: overspeed_threshold
parameters.description: Velocity error threshold indicating overspeed condition

parameters.name: overload_temp_threshold
parameters.description: Temperature threshold for short-time overload alarm

parameters.name: motor_lock_threshold
parameters.description: Velocity error threshold indicating motor lock condition

parameters.name: current_overload_threshold
parameters.description: Temperature threshold for current overload alarm

state_transition_logic: motor_temperature increases by heat_generation_rate * motor_voltage_command * dt when motor is active
motor_temperature decreases by cooling_rate * (motor_temperature - ambient_temperature) * dt due to natural cooling
motor_temperature is clamped between min_value and max_value
velocity_error_accumulation increases by velocity_error_rate * motor_voltage_command * dt under load
velocity_error_accumulation decreases by velocity_error_decay * velocity_error_accumulation * dt when unloaded
velocity_error_accumulation is clamped between min_value and max_value
position_accuracy_degradation decreases by (1/position_accuracy_timescale) * motor_voltage_command * dt due to encoder wear
position_accuracy_degradation is clamped between min_value and max_value
event_logic: motor_overheat occurs when motor_temperature > overheat_threshold, event_state = max(0, (overheat_threshold - motor_temperature) / overheat_threshold)
excessive_velocity_error occurs when velocity_error_accumulation > velocity_error_threshold, event_state = max(0, (velocity_error_threshold - velocity_error_accumulation) / velocity_error_threshold)
overspeed occurs when velocity_error_accumulation > overspeed_threshold, event_state = max(0, (overspeed_threshold - velocity_error_accumulation) / overspeed_threshold)
short_time_overload occurs when motor_temperature > overload_temp_threshold, event_state = max(0, (overload_temp_threshold - motor_temperature) / overload_temp_threshold)
motor_lock occurs when velocity_error_accumulation > motor_lock_threshold, event_state = max(0, (motor_lock_threshold - velocity_error_accumulation) / motor_lock_threshold)
current_overload occurs when motor_temperature > current_overload_threshold, event_state = max(0, (current_overload_threshold - motor_temperature) / current_overload_threshold)
assumptions: Motor temperature is primarily driven by electrical load and follows simple heat generation/cooling dynamics
Velocity errors accumulate under load conditions and decay naturally when unloaded
Position accuracy degrades gradually over time due to encoder wear and signal degradation
Motor performance outputs are proportional to voltage command and modified by degradation states
All fault conditions are primarily triggered by temperature rise or velocity control degradation
Ambient temperature remains relatively constant during operation
Motor cooling follows simple exponential decay to ambient temperature
